# Client-Side Tags

Tealium integrates with hundreds of client-side tags. Find your preferred vendor and start building better customer experiences.

## About markdown versions

All pages in this area are available in clean markdown format. To access the markdown version of any page, append `/index.md` to the page URL.

Example:
- HTML: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/`
- Markdown: `https://docs.tealium.com/iq-tag-management/getting-started/what-is-tealium-iq/index.md`


## Client-Side Tags


- [6sense Tag](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/6sense/): This article describes how to set up the 6sense tag.

- [Acoustic Digital Analytics Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/acoustic-digital-analytics-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Acoustic Digital Analytics tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [ActOn Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/acton-tag/): This article describes how to set up the ActOn tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [AcuityAds Universal Pixel Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/acuityads-universal-pixel-tag/): This article describes how to set up the AcuityAds Universal Pixel Tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Acxiom Real Identity rTag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/acxiom-real-identity-rtag/): This article describes how to set up the Acxiom Real Identity rTag tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adara Media Pixel Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adara-media-pixel-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adara Media Pixel tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adform Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adform-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adform tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adition (Tagging) Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adition-tagging-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adition (Tagging) tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adition (Track) Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adition-track-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adition (Track) tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adition Cookie Matching Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adition-cookie-matching-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adition Cookie Matching tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adjust Mobile Remote Command Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adjust-mobile-remote-command-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adjust Mobile Remote Command tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adlucent Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adlucent-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adlucent tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [adMarketplace Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/admarketplace-tag/): This article describes how to set up the adMarketplace tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adobe Analytics (SiteCatalyst) Tag Setup Guide (Legacy)](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adobe-analytics-sitecatalyst-tag-legacy/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Analytics (Legacy) tag in your iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adobe Analytics AppMeasurement for JS Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adobe-appmeasurement-for-js-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Analytics AppMeasurement for JS tag in your iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adobe Audience Manager Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adobe-audience-manager-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Audience Manager tag in your iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adobe Experience Cloud ID Service Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adobe-experience-cloud-id-service-tag/): Adobe's Experience Cloud ID Service tag generates unique identifiers, called Cloud ID, for your site visitors. A Cloud ID makes it possible to share and track data for a visitor across your Experience Cloud Solutions. This article describes how to configure the tag in your iQ Tag Management (TiQ) profile.

- [Adobe Experience Platform Web SDK Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adobe-experience-platform-web-sdk-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Experience Platform Web SDK tag.

- [Adobe Heartbeat Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adobe-heartbeat-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Heartbeat Tag tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adobe Media Analytics (3.x SDK) Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adobe-media-analytics-3x-sdk-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Media Analytics (3.x SDK) tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adobe Target Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adobe-target/): This article describes how to set up the Adobe Target tag.

- [Adobe Target Using Global mbox with utag.sync.js](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adobe-target-using-global-mbox-with-utagsyncjs/): This article describes how to set up Adobe Target Using Global mbox with utag.sync.js in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Adobe Test & Target Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adobe-test-target-tag/): Adobe Test & Target gives marketers the necessary capabilities to continually make their online content and offers more relevant to their customers -- yielding greater conversion.

- [Adobe Test & Target (Series)](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adobe-test-target-series/): A series of posts about setting up Adobe Test & Target in Tealium iQ Tag Management.

- [AdRoll Pixel Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adroll-pixel-tag/): This article describes how to set up the AdRoll Pixel tag.

- [AdRoll Smart Pixel Tag Setup Guide (Deprecated)](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/adroll-smart-pixel-tag/): This article describes how to set up the AdRoll Smart Pixel tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Affirm Virtual Card Integration (VCN Integration) Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/affirm-vcn-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Affirm Virtual Card Integration (VCN Integration) tag.

- [AgilOne Webtag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/agilone-webtag-tag/): This article describes how to set up the AgilOne tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [AIM XR Website Tag Setup Guide (formerly DMD)](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/aim-xr-website-tag/): This article describes how to set up the AIM XR Website tag.

- [Airship Web Notify Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/airship-web-notify-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Airship Web Notify tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Akamai mPulse Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/akamai-mpulse-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Akamai mPulse tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Alphonso Website Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/alphonso-website-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Alphonso Website Tag tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Amazon Ads Server Tag Setup Guide](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/amazon-ads-server-tag/): This article describes how to set up the Amazon Ads Server tag in your Tealium iQ Tag Management account.

- [Optimizely Sync Tag Setup Guide (Deprecated)](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/optimizely-sync-tag/): IMPORTANT  This Tag is now deprecated. Please use the [utag.sync.js for implementing Optimizely Synchronous](/client-side-tags/optimizely-synchronous-implementation/). We will continue to support existing instances of the Tag.

- [Optimizely Synchronous Implementation](https://docs.tealium.com/client-side-tags/optimizely-synchronous-implementation/): This post outlines the steps to load Optimizely Synchronous with the utag.sync.js container. The utag.sync.js runs early in the page load when it is included in the section of the page's HTML. To current users of the [Optimizely Sync Tag](/client-side-tags/optimizely-sync-tag/) we highly recommend switching to this form of implementation as the tag has been deprecated. Only existing tag instances are supported.
